title: SONY Bravia LCD 52 inch TV
description:
Sony Bravia LCD Digital Colour TV. MODEL 52Z4500
TV System
Digital, Analog: B/G, D/K, I

TO BE COLLECTED FROM LIVERPOOL,NSW,2170

Old Used TV - The specs are from the online manual -

The KDL-52Z4500 is a 52-inch, Full HD 1080p LCD television from Sony's BRAVIA range, known for features like BRAVIA Engine™ 2 and Live Colour Creation™, with support for DLNA media streaming and connectivity options including HDMI and USB. It was released in the late 2000s and is no longer a current model, though support and specifications can be found on the Sony Australia support site.
Key Features
Display:
52-inch (132cm) LCD screen with 1920 x 1080 resolution.
Picture Quality:
Features BRAVIA Engine™ 2 for video processing and Intelligent Picture technology with Live Colour Creation™.
Connectivity:
Includes HDMI, Component, USB 2.0, and Ethernet ports.
Smart Features:
Supports BRAVIA Sync for seamless control of connected devices and DLNA for photo and music streaming.
Audio:
Integrated stereo speakers with a woofer, offering features like Voice Zoom and various surround sound modes.
Other:
Equipped with an ambient light sensor and Picture Frame Mode for displaying photos.
